steps.name: There is a team owner with a team named UpgradeTeam
Team owner adds members to the team with role Member
Team owner has a group conversation with members in the team
Member 1 has a 1:1 conversation with Member 2 in the team
Member 1 is me
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as Member 1
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
Then I see conversation list
And I see conversation UpgradeVersion in conversation list
And I see conversation with Member 2 in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name UpgradeVersion in conversation list
And Member 2 sends message to group conversation UpgradeVersion
Then I see the message from Member 2 in current conversation
When I type a reply into the text input field and send it
Then I see my reply in current conversation
When I tap the back arrow to go back to conversation list
And Member 2 sends message to Member 1
And I wait until the notification popup disappears
Then I see conversation with Member 2 is having 1 unread messages in conversation list
When I minimise Wire
And I upgrade Wire to the recent version
